hooks.command: $j='C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\stgs-system\DEVELOPMENT_JOURNAL.md'; if(!(Test-Path $j)){exit 0}; if(((Get-Date)-(Get-Item $j).LastWriteTime).TotalMinutes -gt 10){Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Please update DEVELOPMENT_JOURNAL.md before stopping — last entry is more than 10 minutes old."}'}
